name: Benn Farron
description_en: Benn Farron was a Zaunite Sump dweller that was given the opportunity to join the Trifarian Legion due to his ruthless nature, he is a captain and one of the Darius' most loyal soldiers.
description_fr: Benn Farron était un habitant du Sump Zaunite qui a eu l'opportunité de rejoindre la Légion Trifarian en raison de sa nature impitoyable. Il est capitaine et l'un des soldats les plus fidèles de Darius.
